revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:ISO 639 name}} == Usage == This template accepts three parameters: :{{Wikisourcelang-inline|1|2|3}} * '''1''' is the [[language code]] for a Wikisource. Leave "1" blank, or assign to anything other than a language prefix, in order to link to the multilingual Wikisource ([https://wikisource.org/ wikisource.org]). * '''2''' is the page to which you're linking. Optional. * '''3''' is an optional parameter: the text that may appear instead of 2. Optional. ::If neither 2 or 3 are specified, the pagename will be used. == See also == * [[Template:Wikisourcelang]] * [[Template:Wikisource-inline]] * [[Template:Ws]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:ISO 639 name}} == Usage == This template accepts three parameters: :{{Wikisourcelang-inline|1|2|3}} * '''1''' is the [[:en:Language code|Language code]] for a Wikisource. Leave "1" blank, or assign to anything other than a language prefix, in order to link to the multilingual Wikisource ([https://wikisource.org/ wikisource.org]). * '''2''' is the page to which you're linking. Optional. * '''3''' is an optional parameter: the text that may appear instead of 2. Optional. ::If neither 2 or 3 are specified, the pagename will be used. == See also == * [[Template:Wikisourcelang]] * [[Template:Wikisource-inline]] * [[Template:Ws]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:ISO 639 name}} == Usage == This template accepts three parameters: :{{Wikisourcelang-inline|1|2|3}} * '''1''' is the [[:en:Language code|Language code]] for a Wikisource. Leave "1" blank, or assign to anything other than a language prefix, in order to link to the multilingual Wikisource ([https://wikisource.org/ wikisource.org]). * '''2''' is the page to which you're linking. Optional. * '''3''' is an optional parameter: the text that may appear instead of 2. Optional. ::If neither 2 or 3 are specified, the pagename will be used. == See also == * [[Template:Wikisourcelang]] * [[Template:Wikisource-inline]] * [[Template:Ws]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:ISO 639 name}} == Usage == This template accepts three parameters: :{{Wikisourcelang-inline|1|2|3}} * '''1''' is the [[:en:Language code|Language code]] for a Wikisource. Leave "1" blank, or assign to anything other than a language prefix, in order to link to the multilingual Wikisource ([https://wikisource.org/ wikisource.org]). * '''2''' is the page to which you're linking. Optional. * '''3''' is an optional parameter: the text that may appear instead of 2. Optional. ::If neither 2 or 3 are specified, the pagename will be used. == See also == * [[Template:Wikisourcelang]] * [[Template:Wikisource-inline]] * [[Template:Ws]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:ISO 639 name}} == Usage == This template accepts three parameters: :{{Wikisourcelang-inline|1|2|3}} * '''1''' is the [[:en:Language code|Language code]] for a Wikisource. Leave "1" blank, or assign to anything other than a language prefix, in order to link to the multilingual Wikisource ([https://wikisource.org/ wikisource.org]). * '''2''' is the page to which you're linking. Optional. * '''3''' is an optional parameter: the text that may appear instead of 2. Optional. ::If neither 2 or 3 are specified, the pagename will be used. == See also == * [[Template:Wikisourcelang]] * [[Template:Wikisource-inline]] * [[Template:Ws]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:ISO 639 name}} == Usage == This template accepts three parameters: :{{Wikisourcelang-inline|1|2|3}} * '''1''' is the [[:en:Language code|Language code]] for a Wikisource. Leave "1" blank, or assign to anything other than a language prefix, in order to link to the multilingual Wikisource ([https://wikisource.org/ wikisource.org]). * '''2''' is the page to which you're linking. Optional. * '''3''' is an optional parameter: the text that may appear instead of 2. Optional. ::If neither 2 or 3 are specified, the pagename will be used. == See also == * [[Template:Wikisourcelang]] * [[Template:Wikisource-inline]] * [[Template:Ws]] {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25015587690|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:ISO 639 name}} == Usage == This template accepts three parameters: :{{Wikisourcelang-inline|1|2|3}} * '''1''' is the [[:en:Language code|Language code]] for a Wikisource. Leave "1" blank, or assign to anything other than a language prefix, in order to link to the multilingual Wikisource ([https://wikisource.org/ wikisource.org]). * '''2''' is the page to which you're linking. Optional. * '''3''' is an optional parameter: the text that may appear instead of 2. Optional. ::If neither 2 or 3 are specified, the pagename will be used. == See also == * [[Template:Wikisourcelang]] * [[Template:Wikisource-inline]] * [[Template:Ws]] {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Wikisource link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
